title: Brotein as the prototype Rankett refactored
html:
Through-line

The dominant story Yahir has told himself about the brotein → rankett transition is abandonment + replacement — fitness app didn't monetize, pivoted to agency software. The corpus tells a different story: continuity + relabeling. Every load-bearing primitive Rankett ships in 2026 — creator-attribution plumbing, code-gated access, capped cohorts, leaderboard-as-marketing, ruthless cost-discipline — already existed in Brotein form months before it was renamed. Brotein wasn't killed. Its schema was the spec sheet for Rankett, written before Rankett had a name. The existing arc page from fitness to software the brotein arc frames the wedge as constant; this page argues the infrastructure was constant too, and the pivot was a rename pass over working plumbing.

Chronological arc

  • 2020-05-02 — A 17-year-old in Grants Pass writes 2020 05 02 things with major upside: a 4-bullet COVID-era list (voice command, IoT, "Listen to scientists," automation). Bullet two reads "Voice Command in business (I.E. Alexa, Google Home) — Programming for smart homes for individuals, integrating into business (restaurants, banks, school?)" Whether this is a real precursor to Rankett's "visibility/access in the next interface layer" thesis or post-hoc pattern matching is open. The 2020 list is brief, generalist, and contemporaneous with millions of other people noticing voice assistants — claiming it as "the same structural bet as Rankett, six years early" overstates what one bullet can carry.
  • 2024-12-21 — 2024 12 21 todos captures the cost-discipline instinct in Brotein form: avoid the Apple developer fee, cache API calls. The engine is already running; it's just pointed at infra cost.
  • 2025-06-28 — 2025 06 28 coming soon anabolic bro leadership board is a 5-bullet menu/nutrition-AI feature list ("AI Anabolic Analysis: Menu, Nutrition Label, Any Food Item / Foreign language compatibility for travel / Menu ranking and anabolic suggestion / Anabolic Food Ranking explore database / Protein goal Streak") plus the closing line "The gap between macro tracking and degen eating." The note's title ("leadership board") is the only place the leaderboard primitive surfaces here — there is no "TikTok+leaderboard+share" string in the body, contrary to an earlier draft of this synthesis. The pooled-data-network-effect framing is downstream inference, not source language.
  • 2025-08-13 — 2025 08 13 ai traffic companion idea (CarBUDDY): "TTS is 80% of cost → use AVSpeechSynthesizer." The cost-discipline instinct is now generalized — it's not Brotein-specific, it's how Yahir thinks about every product.
  • 2025-08-21 — 2025 08 21 screenshot 2025 08 21 at 1 49 46 pm 0e81c1f8: RevenueCat dashboard shows Brotein at $0 revenue with 28,000 events. The follow-up screenshot eight minutes later confirms it. This is the operational moment of the pivot — not an LTV-ceiling argument in the abstract, a Friday afternoon staring at a conversion ratio of zero.
  • August 2025 — The Brotein Supabase schema ships with access_codes, access_redemptions, creator_attributions, and invites tables. A B2C fitness app does not need creator-attribution plumbing. Yahir was building B2B2C referral infrastructure inside what looked like a consumer app.
  • Late August 2025 — brotein crew feature launches: max 25 people, code-gated, leaderboard inside. The cap-and-code primitive is live months before it has B2B language wrapped around it.
  • 2025-08-29 — IRL Lore PRD — eight days after the $0 screenshot, the next product begins to take operational form.
  • 2025-12-19 — 2025 12 19 rankett 12 month business plan codifies cost-discipline into 7 Hard Rules (no C-tier clients, no unpaid pilots, no custom builds, etc). The same engine that said "cache the API call" now says "don't take the client."
  • 2026-01-05 — 2026 01 05 rankett partner program: 5 agencies/month accepted, application-only, partner-activation quiz before "Add Client" unlocks. The doc names the fear directly: "too many say yes too fast and you break." This is the brotein crew feature cap-reasoning, four months later, in B2B language.
  • 2026-04-27 — 2026 04 27 rankett com build doc formalizes the $299 platform fee + agency partner ladder. The creator_attributions table from August 2025 is now called agency partner. The schema didn't change. The label did.

Key inflection points

  • The schema as spec sheet (Aug 2025). The single most non-obvious inflection: the brotein data model shipped with B2B2C plumbing five months before Rankett formalized it. creator_attributions → agency partner; access_codes → 5-agencies/month application funnel; crew_code → seat license. The pivot wasn't a rebuild — it was a rename pass over working tables. Yahir's product instinct was building Rankett's data model while his marketing brain still thought he was building a fitness app.
  • The $0 / 28K screenshot (2025-08-21). 2025 08 21 screenshot 2025 08 21 at 1 49 46 pm 0e81c1f8 is the actual provenance of the pivot. The synthesis (from fitness to software the brotein arc) names LTV ceiling as a structural reason; this is the operational reason — a dashboard, a Friday, a conversion ratio of zero, eight minutes of staring.
  • The cap-as-fulfillment-throttle reused (2025-08 → 2026-01). brotein crew feature (25-person cap, code-gated) and 2026 01 05 rankett partner program (5 agencies/month, application-gated) are the same artificial-scarcity primitive applied at two layers of the stack. Once you see it as one move, the partner program stops looking like a B2B invention and starts looking like Brotein crew-cap reasoning with B2B vocabulary.
  • The cost-engine generalizing (2024-12 → 2025-12). 2024 12 21 todos' "cache the API call" is the same engine as 2025 12 19 rankett 12 month business plan's "no C-tier clients." Yahir didn't replace the cost-discipline instinct between projects — he promoted what it applied to, from API calls to client selection.

Open questions

  • If the schema was already correct in August 2025, what was the actual delay between Aug 2025 and the Jan 2026 partner program — was Yahir resisting the pivot, refining the GTM, or waiting for the $0 screenshot to make the call obvious?
  • Does the continuity-not-replacement framing apply backwards too — was brotein itself a relabeling of an even earlier prototype, or is it the genuine origin of these primitives?
  • Is the 2020 voice command bet a real precursor or post-hoc pattern matching? If real, what other 2020-era predictions in the corpus deserve the same treatment?

Connections

  • from fitness to software the brotein arc — the existing synthesis this page argues with. That one frames the relationship as wedge-stays-constant / channel-changes; this one says the plumbing stays constant too. Both are true; this page is the operational/infrastructural complement.
  • brotein data model — the most concrete piece of evidence for the schema-as-spec-sheet thesis. If this entity page doesn't yet exist as real content, this synthesis is the trigger to build it out.
  • pooled data network effect — the network-effect primitive that runs unchanged from 2025 06 28 coming soon anabolic bro leadership board (consumer layer) to rankett (agency layer).
  • rankett — the entity this page reframes: not a new product, a renamed one.
  • brotein — the entity this page reframes: not a failure, a working prototype whose data model survived intact.
  • 2026 04 27 rankett com build doc — where the rename pass shows up in formal product language.
